medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Patient fell in bathroom after urinating, did not have any pre-aura or LOC, fell on right arm and shoulder onto door. Presenting with a large right arm laceration, CT head, spine, CXR all negative. Admitted due to MRSA for syncope.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Cervical spondylosis, CAD with pMIBI, aortic insufficiency, right bundle branch block, HTN, peripheral vascular disease s/p bilateral balloon angioplasty, CVA with bilateral vertebral artery stenosis, ulcerative colitis, hypercholesterolemia, squamous cell carcinoma, depression.

physical_examination.general_examination: T 98 BP 155/50 HR 70 RR 16, frail appearing, A/Ox3, vital signs stable.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: NEURO - A&Ox3, CN grossly intact. MSK 4+/5 bilaterally, lower extremity edema. CV - RRR, S1+S2+S3-S4-, SEM LSB.
